CVE-2022-1736.title: Ubuntu's configuration of gnome-control-center allowed Remote Des ...
CVE-2022-1736.description: Ubuntu's configuration of gnome-control-center allowed Remote Desktop Sharing to be enabled by default.

CVE-2023-5616.title: In Ubuntu, gnome-control-center did not properly reflect SSH remo ...
CVE-2023-5616.description: In Ubuntu, gnome-control-center did not properly reflect SSH remote login status when the system was configured to use systemd socket activation for openssh-server. This could unknowingly leave the local machine exposed to remote SSH access contrary to expectation of the user.
